'''鈭歯-d-z-ng''' ('''kanadzengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:teleprint|teleprint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:teleprint|teleprint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-d-z-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kanadzengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinadzengoko|thinadzengoko]] || [[word:jinadzengoko|jinadzengoko]] || [[word:shinadzengoko|shinadzengoko]] || [[word:kinadzengoko|kinadzengoko]]
|-

|-
